# PHIL.074 ? Post-Structuralism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** post_structuralism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Deconstruction; différance; critique of presence; multiplicity of meaning; textual play; anti-foundationalism

## Application
Deconstruct binary oppositions; recognize multiple meanings; critique foundations; textual analysis; defer final meaning

## Key Values
- Deconstruction
- Multiplicity
- Anti-foundation
- Difference

## Tags
philosophy, contemporary, post-structuralism
